title: Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
text: Yahoo Finance provides comprehensive Lucid stock information including real-time quotes, historical prices, earnings data, and news. Current stock price reflects depressed valuation following Q1 2026 results. Historical price chart shows dramatic decline from 2021 IPO highs. The platform aggregates analyst ratings, estimates, and news in centralized location. Key metrics displayed include P/E ratios (not applicable due to losses), market cap, shares outstanding, and major shareholder positions. News feed updates continuously with earnings announcements, analyst actions, and corporate developments.
